reviews.review_description:
It seems not many people know about the passthrough arena - theres a many arenas which is great if the game was more populated.

Theres multiple web windows - 24/7 hockey youtube stream, nhl, hockey news. Pretty cool feature. The game has amazing potential. Its been updated a bunch by the developer who has been showing a lot of passion about the project…

The phics feel better than any other hockey game on VR right now in my opinion. It uses havok physics engine which is a really good engine. Teres air hockey and other mini games as well if you dont wanna practice shooting pucks

is this some kind of dark joke? I spent 8 cents on this sheet and it's still WAY TOO MUCH. I wouldn't believe that a quest game could look and work so bad. this piece of trash should never have been brought to the store in this condition. the level of this thing is pitifully low

developer_response.body: hey bud, I just pushed a resolution and frame rate update that solves this - but if you got the game and are going to get all of its future updates for only 8 cents than i dont mind if you refund the game now and buy if for full price in the future once you feel its right for you.. but if not... Thanks for playing, hope youll reconsider your review once you have played the new update.

reviews.review_title: Trash! Looks like a money grab to me!
reviews.review_description:
Listen.. I understand that your game is in development and that buyers should ajust their expectations acordingly, but come on... This game is unplayable. The expirence is nothing like the screenshots. This should be free with the option of donations. 99% discount is already to much at this stage.

The reason I feel obliged to write this review is because I can not beleave that the positive reviews are not written by friends and/or familiy.

Btw. Regarding quest optimiser that should not be our resposability. Get your product in order.

Buyers beware, you are not buying a game you are donating to a open promise, potentialy worse!

developer_response.body: You may have played a bugged patch where the visual were not showing up at all. This has been addressed and fixed hope youll enjoy the update. sorry about that

reviews.review_title: Best hockey game 🏒 w. air hockey+chess
reviews.review_description:
Don't listen to the trolls, this game looks fine and is filled with many fun things hockey to do. You can use hand tracking for air hockey, chess, or to use the sticks in the game. The old update had a lower resolution but the developer is constantly updating, fixing, & listening to the community. Love the live video RSS feeds of people around the world playing hockey at the same time in the arena.

Controls are great and smooth.

5/5 excited for the future of this game.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words / appreciating! much more to come!

reviews.review_title: Not worth your time and money
reviews.review_description: This thing should not be on Meta Store - certainly not as paid app

developer_response.body: You may have played a bugged patch where the visual were not showing up at all. This has been addressed and fixed hope youll enjoy the update.

reviews.review_description: This is a good place to have fun and goof off with your friends. There a variety of mini games and activities to explore.

reviews.review_title: Always enjoy supporting indie game devs!
reviews.review_description: Hey man even if you people tell you it sucks you'll get it eventually. Making a game is freaking hard so some trial and error is needed and just know that you are 100 times more skilled than the haters!

developer_response.body:
thank you for the kind words. Just pushed a graphics update so things are up to 2k textures and 80% resolution. 

Next update will be working on a magnetic feature for the hockey sticks and making the scoreboard keep track of the score up to 7

reviews.review_description: Recommended for anyone looking to enjoy hockey-style fun in mini form, with mini games....  Whilst this is is still early access and you have to bare that in mind I am looking forward to seeing where the dev takes it.
Developer Nathan knocked it out of the ark!
How can I get more resolution in the game?

developer_response.body: hey, thanks for playing! (Right now it's set to 80%) res can try quest game optimizer tool to play with resolution to bring it to 100%. Will try to work on getting full res in the next update!

reviews.review_description: Feels good to skate around, great sound and looks good, not too far in so just an early impression of this so far, looking forward to delving in more.
Movement and sounds are great. I've just started playing, but I think it will be fun.

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing, new Havok Physics update will feel a lot smoother! :)

reviews.review_title: One of the best hockey games on Quest
reviews.review_description: By far one of the most fun hockey games available in virtual reality. by far. Absolutely unreal. Love the sound effects, and seasonal themed updates!
I’ve only played a few hrs and have enjoyed it so far!
